<Meta title="Molecules/Meta/Resource Meta" />

# Resource Meta

Displays metadata for downloadable resources and media content within teaser cards and list items. Renders category, publication date, and resource type indicators alongside an optional image or video.

## Interactive Preview

<Canvas of={MetaStories.Resource} />
<Controls of={MetaStories.Resource} />

## When to use it

Use Resource Meta inside card and list-item view modes for Resource nodes. It's the lighter-weight companion to [Resource Detail](?path=/docs/molecules-meta-resource-detail--docs) — use Resource Meta for teasers, Resource Detail for the full node page. Both come from the same Resource content type and are candidates for future consolidation into a single template.

## Resource Types

The component renders differently depending on `resource_meta__resource_type`:

- **`video`** — renders an embedded video player (oEmbed) as the primary media
- **`document`** — renders a document thumbnail image with a download CTA
- **`image`** — renders an image without a download CTA

The interactive preview above is fixed to `video`. The [Visreg story](?path=/story/molecules-meta-visreg--visreg) covers all three branches across theme variations.

## Technical Specifications

- **Atomic Level**: Molecule
- **Template**: `yds-resource-meta.twig`
- **Partials**: `_yds-resource-meta--document.twig`, `_yds-resource-meta--metadata.twig`, `_yds-resource-meta--video.twig`
- **Styles**: `_yds-resource-meta.scss`

### Accessibility

- Download button includes `resource_meta__download_aria_label` for screen readers
- Resource type is visually indicated and conveyed semantically
- WCAG AA color contrast across all theme combinations

## Related Components

- **Resource Detail**: Full-page meta header used on the Resource node page. Both components come from the same Resource content type and are candidates for future consolidation.
- **Image**: Used for document and image resource type thumbnails
- **Video Embed**: Used for video resource type previews
